name: Single Responsibility Principle
description: A class or struct should have only one reason to change. Classes with >3 distinct responsibilities should be split.

name: Dependency Injection Over Singletons
description: Avoid accessing global singletons directly inside business logic. Prefer constructor injection for testability.
auto_fix_hint: Pass dependencies via initializer or property injection

name: Protocol-Oriented Design
description: Use protocols to abstract concrete types. Avoid concrete type coupling between layers.
auto_fix_hint: Extract a protocol from the concrete type and depend on the protocol

name: No Business Logic in SwiftUI Views
description: SwiftUI views must be dumb. Business logic, network calls, and data transformation belong in ViewModels or services.

name: Modular Feature Boundaries
description: Features should not import each other directly. Cross-feature communication must go through shared interfaces or a coordinator.
auto_fix_hint: Use a Coordinator or Router pattern for cross-feature navigation
